title: CIT van rammed and bombed near Randfontein by gang
description: NATIONAL NEWS - The police are investigating...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Armed with automatic rifles, robbers held up security officers on a busy provincial route during peak afternoon traffic."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The police are investigating a cash-in-transit heist that occurred on the R28 yesterday afternoon in Mohlakeng, Randfontein.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The police are investigating a cash-in-transit heist that occurred on the R28 yesterday afternoon in Mohlakeng, Randfontein."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Randfontein Herald reports that according to police spokesperson Captain Tintswalo Sibeko, a green Toyota bakkie carrying about 12 suspects rammed a cash van."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The suspects were armed with automatic rifles and ordered the security guards to exit the vehicle. Shots were fired during the incident before the van was bombed. An undisclosed amount of cash was stolen. No injuries were reported,” Sibeko said.","html":"“The suspects were armed with automatic rifles and ordered the security guards to exit the vehicle. Shots were fired during the incident before the van was bombed. An undisclosed amount of cash was stolen. No injuries were reported,” Sibeko said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added the suspects fled the scene in a white Mercedes-Benz and a white Chery.","html":"He added the suspects fled the scene in a white Mercedes-Benz and a white Chery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Investigations are ongoing.","html":"Investigations are ongoing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information that may assist the investigation is urged to contact the Crime Stop Line on 08600 10111 or report via the MySAPS App.","html":"Anyone with information that may assist the investigation is urged to contact the Crime Stop Line on 08600 10111 or report via the MySAPS App."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"}]
bodyHtml: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Armed with automatic rifles, robbers held up security officers on a busy provincial route during peak afternoon traffic."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NATIONAL NEWS - The police are investigating a cash-in-transit heist that occurred on the R28 yesterday afternoon in Mohlakeng, Randfontein.","html":"NATIONAL NEWS - The police are investigating a cash-in-transit heist that occurred on the R28 yesterday afternoon in Mohlakeng, Randfontein."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Randfontein Herald reports that according to police spokesperson Captain Tintswalo Sibeko, a green Toyota bakkie carrying about 12 suspects rammed a cash van."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“The suspects were armed with automatic rifles and ordered the security guards to exit the vehicle. Shots were fired during the incident before the van was bombed. An undisclosed amount of cash was stolen. No injuries were reported,” Sibeko said.","html":"“The suspects were armed with automatic rifles and ordered the security guards to exit the vehicle. Shots were fired during the incident before the van was bombed. An undisclosed amount of cash was stolen. No injuries were reported,” Sibeko said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He added the suspects fled the scene in a white Mercedes-Benz and a white Chery.","html":"He added the suspects fled the scene in a white Mercedes-Benz and a white Chery."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Investigations are ongoing.","html":"Investigations are ongoing."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Anyone with information that may assist the investigation is urged to contact the Crime Stop Line on 08600 10111 or report via the MySAPS App.","html":"Anyone with information that may assist the investigation is urged to contact the Crime Stop Line on 08600 10111 or report via the MySAPS App."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Article: Caxton Network News","html":"Article: Caxton Network News"}]

images.alt: CIT van rammed and bombed near Randfontein by gang

author: Caxton Network News
teaser: Armed with automatic rifles, robbers held up security officers on a busy provincial route during peak afternoon traffic.
featuredCaption: Residents gather around a bombed CIT van after a heist on the R28. Photo: EPR Security
